input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.9.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.9.3
            TITLE: the tractive system master switch (tsms) must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.9.3: The Tractive System Master Switch (TSMS) must:
EV.7.9.3 The Tractive System Master Switch (TSMS) must:  
a. Open the Shutdown Circuit in the OFF position  EV.7.2.2  
b. Be the last switch before the AIRs except for Precharge circuitry and Interlocks.   
c. Be in the center of a completely orange circular area of > 50 mm in diameter 
d. Be labeled “TS” and the symbol specified in ISO 7010-W012  (triangle with black 
lightning bolt on yellow background). 
e. Be fitted with a "lockout/tagout" capability in the OFF position  EV.11.3.1

final_answer: EV.7.9.3 The Tractive System Master Switch (TSMS) must: a. Open the Shutdown Circuit in the OFF position EV.7.2.2 b. Be the last switch before the AIRs except for Precharge circuitry and Interlocks. c. Be in the center of a completely orange circular area of > 50 mm in diameter d. Be labeled “TS” and the symbol specified in ISO 7010-W012 (triangle with black lightning bolt on yellow background). e. Be fitted with a "lockout/tagout" capability in the OFF position EV.11.3.1
